# Do-stlar_bilan
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="uz">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Amaliy vazifa 2</title>
/* buni men ishladim Bagdaulet */
<style>
    * {
        margin: 0;
        padding: 0;
        box-sizing: border-box;
    }

    body {
        font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
        background: #f4f4f4;
        text-align: center;
    }

    /* HEADER */
    header {
        background: #6a0dad;
        color: white;
        padding: 40px 20px;
    }

    header h2 {
        font-size: 28px;
        margin-bottom: 10px;
    }

    header p {
        margin-bottom: 15px;
    }

    header button {
        padding: 10px 20px;
        background: orange;
        border: none;
        cursor: pointer;
        font-weight: bold;
    }

    /* SECTION */
    section {
        width: 80%;
        height: 300px;   /* ✅ width va height berildi */
        margin: 30px auto;
        background: #222;
        padding: 20px;
    }

    section img {
        width: 200px;
        height: 120px;
        margin: 10px;
    }

    /* FOOTER */
    footer {
        background: #111;
        color: white;
        padding: 15px;
    }
</style>

</head>
<body>

<header>
    <h2>Roblox O'yinlar</h2>
    <p>Eng mashhur o'yinlarni tomosha qiling</p>
    <button>Boshlash</button>
</header>
/* buni men ishladim Doston */
<section>
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="img1">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="img2">
    <img src="https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcTs5gcPHcxk_ithT02BLbExt6L7OOj0iqaCxw&s" alt="img3">
</section>

<footer>
    <p>© 2026 Barcha huquqlar himoyalangan</p>
</footer>

</body>
</html>
